title: oenothera cespitosa subsp. marginata
intro: Oenothera cespitosa subsp. marginata, commonly known as the beach evening primrose or coastal evening primrose, is a flowering plant species within the family Onagraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Oenothera cespitosa subsp. marginata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can contribute to overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
